NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Sep-12-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Matter on calendar with case number PED-11-294885 (Constantine Konstin vs. Sydna Christine Konstin).

Off the record:

Appearances:

Amir Rang for and with Constantine "Gus" Konstin, Petitioner.

No appearance by Respondent.

Parties settled; matters off calendar.

Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Lazatin.

NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Aug-29-2011 Reset To Sep-12-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on calendar today for Elder Adult Abuse OSC and TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204. Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan. Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR# 11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

This matter heard with case number 294885.

Appearances: Amir Rang and Jyan Ferng for Constantine Konstin. Lynn Searle and Daniel Murphy for and with Sydna Konstin and Sydna Konstin.

Respondents were sworn prior to the commencement of the hearing.

Constantine Konstin was medically unable to appear. Ms. Searle objected to going forward with the petition without Mr. Konstin being present. The matter was continued to September 12, 2011 at 1:30 p.m., in Dept. 204. The temporary restraining orders remain in place as they are until that date (orders to be prepared by Mr. Rang).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.
